certificate.note: Shared-G/H inline artifact for corrected copy experiment; certification fields inherited only for schema compatibility.

tasks.zigzag_density_control_note: Set d=13 because per-layer randomized zigzag unique mask density averages about 9.8%, closest to 10% in the integer d sweep.
tasks.model_layer_override_note: Model layers set to 8; data, q, B, input/output format unchanged; graph degree set to d=13 for ~10% actual unique zigzag density.
